Fetched: 2026-03-22

# OpenAI Status - Recent Incidents

## March 2026 (All Resolved)
- Mar 21: Pinned chats not loading on web browsers for ChatGPT - Conversations component affected
- Mar 18: Sora Video Generation Failing - video generation error rates returned to normal
- Mar 17: Excel Plugin Inaccessibility - all impacted services recovered (Connectors/Apps)
- Mar 17: ChatGPT 5.4 Pro High Error Rates - all impacted services recovered (Conversations)
- Mar 17: Sign-In and Account Creation Issues - all impacted services recovered (Login/Auth)
- Mar 17: Elevated Errors for ChatGPT Free and Guest Plan Users - resolved
- Mar 13: Responses API errors during background mode usage - resolved
- Mar 13: Conversation errors affecting logged-out users - resolved

## Affected Components (Historical)
Common affected areas: Conversations, Video generation, Login, File uploads, Image Generation, Deep Research, Codex, Search, Audio, Realtime API, Batch processing, Fine-tuning, Embeddings, GPTs, Voice mode, Sora, Compliance API, Responses, Moderations, Connectors/Apps, ChatGPT Atlas, Agent systems.
All documented incidents show Resolved status.
Feed generated: March 22, 2026
